chunkDmo.title: Chunk DMO
chunkDmo.description: API name of the Data Cloud chunk entity (ending in _chunk__dlm). Use ExploreDataCloud to find it.

searchIndex.title: Search Index
searchIndex.description: API name of the Data Cloud search index entity (ending in _index__dlm). Use ExploreDataCloud to find it.
